segments.text: India's fastest growing jobs are not in Bengaluru or Mumbai. They're in tier 2 and tier three cities and the numbers are wild. Hiring in these cities is
growing 21% compared to 14% in metros this year. Luckno is turning into a tech talent pipeline of back-end developers,
customer operations, all driven by a rising startup scene. Coimator is scaling electric vehicle manufacturing and software engineering through
expanding IT parks. Surat, Nagpur and Vodra are becoming specialty manufacturing and logistics hubs thanks
to upgraded industrial zones. But the biggest transformation is Vishaka Patna.
Google's 15 billion AI hub will include a gigawatt scale data center, subc cable landing and renewable energy integration
creating 25,000 to 35,000 jobs in data engineering, cloud infra, cyber security and AI research. This is India's new job map and if you're building a career,
these are the cities to watch.
